request.output_text: p05_golden_audit_alpha_001 will always succeed and is guaranteed to work for every customer. The rollout plan lists owner, metric, rollback trigger, customer notice, and monitoring checks, but it still makes an absolute claim that should be audited.
p05_golden_audit_beta_002 can ship today after the checklist is signed. It cannot ship today because the rollback owner is missing. The note includes enough detail to avoid a short-answer warning.
